EmailTemplate.name: AES - Referee invite
EmailTemplate.subject: Would you be willing to provide a reference?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
WE'D LOVE YOUR INPUT.
Hi {!b3o__Reference__c.b3o__First_Name_Referee__c},
{!b3o__Reference__c.Candidate_Name__c} has applied for a role with Alliance Extra Staff, and you've been nominated as their reference. We’d value your input on their character, performance, and how well they might suit this role.
You can provide the reference by filling out this form:
PROVIDE REFERENCE
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
